description: Loads and renders another ActionUI view description from a URL, file path, or app bundle resource. Exactly one of url/filePath/name must be set.

url.description: Remote http/https URL to a JSON or binary plist view description; loaded asynchronously

filePath.description: Absolute file path to a local JSON or binary plist view description

name.description: Filename of a JSON or plist resource in the app bundle

viewDidLoadActionID.description: Fired once after a new sub-view is successfully loaded (not re-fired on SwiftUI rebuilds)

value.description: Source string (URL / file path / bundle name); set via setElementValue to reload from a different source
